meta.title: Amazon US Category Compliance & Certification Requirements

requirements.description: All children's toys and baby products must provide a CPC certificate and corresponding laboratory test reports.
Radio frequency devices require FCC certification; powered products should have UL/ETL reports, and battery-operated items require UN38.3.
Food, cosmetics, and medical devices require FDA registration or listing.
Automotive parts related to safety require DOT certification, and those related to emissions require EPA certification.
Pesticide devices or products containing pesticides require an EPA registration/establishment number.
Textiles usually require an RN number; children's apparel also requires a CPC.

default.description: General merchandise usually only needs to meet basic packaging and labeling requirements (Country of Origin, Warning labels, etc.).
